name: Beaver Transportation Inc Buzy
registry_source: NPI registry (NPI 1952629784) + business directories (Manta, Yellow Pages, Yelp, BBB)
notes: Legal name 'BUZY AS A BEAVER TRANSPORTATION, INC' (Chicago, IL). No FMCSA SAFER record found under any name variant ('Beaver Transportation', 'Buzy Beaver', 'Buzy As A Beaver'). Company is registered as Non-Emergency Medical Transport (Van) per NPI 1952629784; specializes in door-to-door special needs transportation funded by the state of Illinois and workers' compensation; also serves Midway/O'Hare. Established 2010; enumerated organization 5/4/2010. President: Nichole J Driver. Estimated annual revenue ~$144K with ~2 employees. Address 6730 S Langley Ave, Chicago, IL 60637 confirmed. Likely intrastate-only (Medicaid/wheelchair van); not a school bus operator per se. No USDOT (likely intrastate).
